// Structure: Conditional
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{


    
    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {


        switch (key)
        {
            case "æ":
            case "à":
            case "ä":
            case "ö":
            case "ü":
            case "ß":
            case "é":
            case "è":
            case "ê":
            case "ç":
            case "ñ":
            case "ø":
            case "å":
                return true;
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }
    
    public const int ItemCount = 13;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 1;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 1;
    public const bool HasNumber = false;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
